gaps.title: Historical Correlations

current_state_evidence.quote: Phase A uses a diagonal Σ (no cross-correlations) with hardcoded priors. Phase B will replace with empirical estimation.
current_state_evidence.implication: computePlausibility() treats all 30 VARIABLE_META variables as independent — covariance terms are all zero

current_state_evidence.finding: No sigma_matrices, covariance_matrices, or equivalent table found in DB schema
current_state_evidence.note: metric_correlations stores market-level submarket pairings, not assumption-variable covariance
Market-level F4 correlations — 7-day TTL staleness flag surfaced to UI (D-04 in DORMANT_IMPROVEMENTS_AUDIT)

missing_elements: sigma_matrices table (stored empirical covariance for each stratum: asset_class × market_tier × regime)
Daily compute job over rent_inflation_observations + deal_historical_outcomes pairs
Per-variable contribution decomposition (mahalanobisD, perVariableContribution) — PENDING Phase 2
Regime detection for conditional covariance — PENDING Phase 2

highest_leverage_pairs.rationale: Rent-vacancy inverse drives most IRR variance
DSCR constraints bind jointly; lender underwriting logic
Heavy capex precedes above-market growth bets
Concessions are a proxy for demand pressure
Cap rate historically tracks rate environment
High-opex assets trend toward higher growth

gaps.leverage_rationale: No corpus exists to compute from (Gap 3 dependency). Once archive clears 30 rows, adding empirical Σ converts plausibility scoring from heuristic-band to statistically grounded distance. Leverage is high after Gap 3 is seeded; low before.
